{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TyfFHVeH6kAVZnZQkfnaH8","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n    36→\n    37→  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    45→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    46→    listingId\n    47→  );\n    48→\n    49→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    50→}\n    51→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0f2f8ceb-12d1-4ef2-ada5-bdfef2314ecc","uuid":"b318306b-ddd0-434c-a72f-0c47d82e61a1","timestamp":"2026-03-23T21:03:33.627Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/telegram/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n\n  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    telegramLink.trim(),\n    listingId\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","numLines":51,"startLine":1,"totalLines":51}}}

  2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n    36→\n    37→  if (\n    38→    !discordLink ||\n    39→    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    40→    !(\n    41→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n    42→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    43→    )\n    44→  ) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      {\n    47→        error:\n    48→          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n    49→      },\n    50→      { status: 400 }\n    51→    );\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    55→    discordLink.trim(),\n    56→    listingId\n    57→  );\n    58→\n    59→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    60→}\n    61→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0f2f8ceb-12d1-4ef2-ada5-bdfef2314ecc","uuid":"78937955-ce29-4256-967c-c407aef43e47","timestamp":"2026-03-23T21:03:34.079Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/discord/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n\n  if (\n    !discordLink ||\n    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    !(\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    )\n  ) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error:\n          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n      },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    discordLink.trim(),\n    listingId\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","numLines":61,"startLine":1,"totalLines":61}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01V6VWHCssA2WNF7HuMP2LjN","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!applicationId || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    44→  const application = db\n    45→    .prepare(\n    46→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    47→    )\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    49→\n    50→  if (!application) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    53→      { status: 404 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    58→\n    59→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    62→      // Check if group is already full\n    63→      const { count } = db\n    64→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    66→\n    67→      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    68→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      // Update application status\n    72→      db.prepare(\n    73→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    74→      ).run(applicationId);\n    75→\n    76→      // Add to members\n    77→      db.prepare(\n    78→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    79→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    80→\n    81→      // Check if group is now full\n    82→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    83→      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n    84→      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    85→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    86→\n    87→        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n    88→        rejectedApps = db\n    89→          .prepare(\n    90→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    91→          )\n    92→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n    93→\n    94→        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n    95→          db.prepare(\n    96→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    97→          ).run(app.id);\n    98→        }\n    99→\n   100→        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n   101→      }\n   102→      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n   103→    });\n   104→\n   105→    try {\n   106→      const result = approveTransaction();\n   107→\n   108→      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n   109→      try {\n   110→        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n   111→\n   112→        if (result.isFull) {\n   113→          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   114→          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n   115→            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   116→          }\n   117→        }\n   118→      } catch (notifErr) {\n   119→        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   120→      }\n   121→\n   122→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   123→    } catch (err) {\n   124→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   125→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   126→    }\n   127→  } else {\n   128→    // Reject\n   129→    db.prepare(\n   130→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   131→    ).run(applicationId);\n   132→\n   133→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   134→\n   135→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   136→  }\n   137→}\n   138→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0f2f8ceb-12d1-4ef2-ada5-bdfef2314ecc","uuid":"3445aa92-0eb9-4f67-8e0b-e7a0af513e00","timestamp":"2026-03-23T21:03:34.623Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n\n        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n        rejectedApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n        }\n\n        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n","numLines":138,"startLine":1,"totalLines":138}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012AcX6uodq5UZxjdkVTqy43","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Member {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  display_name: string;\n    10→  bio: string;\n    11→  joined_at: string;\n    12→}\n    13→\n    14→interface Applicant {\n    15→  application_id: number;\n    16→  id: number;\n    17→  display_name: string;\n    18→  bio: string;\n    19→  applied_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→interface Listing {\n    23→  id: number;\n    24→  author_id: number;\n    25→  book_title: string;\n    26→  book_author: string;\n    27→  book_cover_url: string;\n    28→  language: string;\n    29→  reading_pace: string;\n    30→  start_date: string;\n    31→  meeting_format: string;\n    32→  max_group_size: number;\n    33→  telegram_link: string;\n    34→  is_full: number;\n    35→  requires_approval: number;\n    36→  created_at: string;\n    37→  author_name: string;\n    38→  members: Member[];\n    39→  memberCount: number;\n    40→  isMember: boolean;\n    41→  isAuthor: boolean;\n    42→  hasApplied: boolean;\n    43→  applicationStatus: string;\n    44→  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n    45→  currentUserId: number | null;\n    46→  telegramBotConfigured: boolean;\n    47→  discordBotConfigured: boolean;\n    48→  platform_preference: string;\n    49→  discord_link: string;\n    50→}\n    51→\n    52→export default function ListingDetail() {\n    53→  const { id } = useParams();\n    54→  const router = useRouter();\n    55→  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n    56→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    57→  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n    58→  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n    59→  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    60→  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    61→  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [autoTelegramLoading, setAutoTelegramLoading] = useState(false);\n    63→  const [autoTelegramLink, setAutoTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    64→  const [showManualFallback, setShowManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    65→  // Discord state\n    66→  const [discordLink, setDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    67→  const [discordSaving, setDiscordSaving] = useState(false);\n    68→  const [autoDiscordLoading, setAutoDiscordLoading] = useState(false);\n    69→  const [autoDiscordLink, setAutoDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    70→  const [showDiscordManualFallback, setShowDiscordManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    71→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    72→\n    73→  // Rating state\n    74→  const [givenRatings, setGivenRatings] = useState<Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }>>({});\n    75→  const [ratingScores, setRatingScores] = useState<Record<number, number>>({});\n    76→  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n    77→  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    78→  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    79→\n    80→  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n    81→\n    82→  const [fetchError, setFetchError] = useState(false);\n    83→  const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false);\n    84→  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n    85→\n    86→  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    87→    try {\n    88→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    89→      const data = await res.json();\n    90→      if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n    91→        setListing(data.listing);\n    92→        setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    93→        setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n    94→      } else if (res.status === 404) {\n    95→        setNotAvailable(true);\n    96→      } else {\n    97→        setFetchError(true);\n    98→      }\n    99→    } catch {\n   100→      setFetchError(true);\n   101→    } finally {\n   102→ client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Applicant {\n  application_id: number;\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  applied_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n  hasApplied: boolean;\n  applicationStatus: string;\n  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n  currentUserId: number | null;\n  telegramBotConfigured: boolean;\n  discordBotConfigured: boolean;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  discord_link: string;\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetail() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [autoTelegramLoading, setAutoTelegramLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [autoTelegramLink, setAutoTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [showManualFallback, setShowManualFallback] = useState(false);\n  // Discord state\n  const [discordLink, setDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [discordSaving, setDiscordSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [autoDiscordLoading, setAutoDiscordLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [autoDiscordLink, setAutoDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [showDiscordManualFallback, setShowDiscordManualFallback] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  // Rating state\n  const [givenRatings, setGivenRatings] = useState<Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }>>({});\n  const [ratingScores, setRatingScores] = useState<Record<number, number>>({});\n  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n\n  const [fetchError, setFetchError] = useState(false);\n  const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false);\n  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n\n  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n        setListing(data.listing);\n        setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n        setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n      } else if (res.status === 404) {\n        setNotAvailable(true);\n      } else {\n        setFetchError(true);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      setFetchError(true);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [id]);\n\n  const handleDelete = async () => {\n    setDeleting(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        router.push(\"/\");\n      } else {\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to delete listing\");","numLines":120,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1468}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01JdCcHCZAjc9a7MqeJJsRaZ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015JLead756E7ZTRt1bSWNmR","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create --title \"fix: code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation\" --label \"bug,P1,approved\" --body \"Code review round 5 findings:\n\n1. **Author receives duplicate notifications when group fills** — \\`notifyGroupFull\\` includes the author (who is always in \\`listing_members\\`), so the author gets both a \\`new_member\\` and \\`group_full\\` notification for the same join event.\n\n2. **Platform links can be set before group is full** — Telegram and Discord link-setting routes don't check \\`is_full\\`, allowing premature link storage via API.\n\n3. **applicationId not validated as integer** — PATCH applications accepts non-numeric values silently, producing confusing 404s instead of 400.\n\n4. **fetchListing not wrapped in useCallback** — ESLint warning suppressed; function not stable across renders.\" --add-project \"Bookmate\"","description":"Create issue for code review round 5"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7889,"cache_read_input_tokens":36654,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":7889},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0f2f8ceb-12d1-4ef2-ada5-bdfef2314ecc","uuid":"c5230f6d-b969-44a7-b5ed-63c65dd8c8c2"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"tool_result","content":"Exit code 1\nunknown flag: --add-project\n\nUsage:  gh issue create [flags]\n\nFlags:\n  -a, --assignee login   Assign people by their login. Use \"@me\" to self-assign.\n  -b, --body string      Supply a body. Will prompt for one otherwise.\n  -F, --body-file file   Read body text from file (use \"-\" to read from standard input)\n  -e, --editor           Skip prompts and open the text editor to write the title and body in. The first line is the title and the remaining text is the body.\n  -l, --label name       Add labels by name\n  -m, --milestone name   Add the issue to a milestone by name\n  -p, --project title    Add the issue to projects by title\n      --recover string   Recover input from a failed run of create\n  -T, --template name    Template name to use as starting body text\n  -t, --title string     Supply a title. Will prompt for one otherwise.\n  -w, --web              Open the browser to create an issue","is_error":true,"tool_use_id":"toolu_015JLead756E7ZTRt1bSWNmR"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0f2f8ceb-12d1-4ef2-ada5-bdfef2314ecc","uuid":"04da8bdf-00e7-4f13-8c05-a7700ae47340","timestamp":"2026-03-23T21:03:47.116Z","tool_use_result":"Error: Exit code 1\nunknown flag: --add-project\n\nUsage:  gh issue create [flags]\n\nFlags:\n  -a, --assignee login   Assign people by their login. Use \"@me\" to self-assign.\n  -b, --body string      Supply a body. Will prompt for one otherwise.\n  -F, --body-file file   Read body text from file (use \"-\" to read from standard input)\n  -e, --editor           Skip prompts and open the text editor to write the title and body in. The first line is the title and the remaining text is the body.\n  -l, --label name       Add labels by name\n  -m, --milestone name   Add the issue to a milestone by name\n  -p, --project title    Add the issue to projects by title\n      --recover string   Recover input from a failed run of create\n  -T, --template name    Template name to use as starting body text\n  -t, --title string     Supply a title. Will prompt for one otherwise.\n  -w, --web              Open the browser to create an issue"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01QMRvQFyjSzYyyrEKSfnPWg","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01U8ExSrb3EzCqDveCwa1rhm","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create --title \"fix: code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation\" --label \"bug,P1,approved\" --project \"Bookmate\" --body \"Code review round 5 findings:\n\n1. **Author receives duplicate notifications when group fills** — notifyGroupFull includes the author (who is always in listing_members), so the author gets both a new_member and group_full notification for the same join event.\n\n2. **Platform links can be set before group is full** — Telegram and Discord link-setting routes don't check is_full, allowing premature link storage via API.\n\n3. **applicationId not validated as integer** — PATCH applications accepts non-numeric values silently, producing confusing 404s instead of 400.\n\n4. **fetchListing not wrapped in useCallback** — ESLint warning suppressed; function not stable across renders.\"","description":"Create issue for code review round 5"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":613,"cache_read_input_tokens":44543,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":613},"output_tokens":73,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0f2f8ceb-12d1-4ef2-ada5-bdfef2314ecc","uuid":"847087fc-c9c7-42a3-8606-ef579ef787f8"}

AND user_id != ?\")\n    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":120,"cache_read_input_tokens":45497,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":120},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0f2f8ceb-12d1-4ef2-ada5-bdfef2314ecc","uuid":"4aad0009-11b3-4d94-8481-6dd95d242208"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01WoHgbzs2Q1tv7dNdsPcTso","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0f2f8ceb-12d1-4ef2-ada5-bdfef2314ecc","uuid":"31dbef47-a746-4488-92ba-3f0c896879b5","timestamp":"2026-03-23T21:04:04.707Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","oldString":"export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string } | undefined;\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];","newString":"export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];","originalFile":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number | null,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n  switch (type) {\n    case \"new_member\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    case \"group_full\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    case \"application_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    case \"application_approved\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    case \"application_rejected\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    case \"rating_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    case \"listing_deleted\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    default:\n      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyListingAuthor(\n  listingId: number,\n  joinerName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"new_member\",\n      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationReceived(\n  listingId: number,\n  applicantName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"application_received\",\n      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationDecision(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n    const message =\n      decision === \"approved\"\n        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string } | undefined;\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":112,"oldLines":11,"newStart":112,"newLines":12,"lines":[" "," export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {","   const listing = db","-    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","-    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string } | undefined;","+    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","+    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;","+  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification","   const members = db","-    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")","-    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];","+    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")","+    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];"," ","   if (listing) {","     const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

 if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }","newString":"  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n\n  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    telegramLink.trim(),\n    listingId\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":32,"oldLines":6,"newStart":32,"newLines":13,"lines":["     );","   }"," ","+  if (!listing.is_full) {","+    return NextResponse.json(","+      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },","+      { status: 400 }","+    );","+  }","+","   const { telegramLink } = await req.json();"," ","   if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n\n  if (\n    !discordLink ||\n    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    !(\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    )\n  ) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error:\n          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n      },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    discordLink.trim(),\n    listingId\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":32,"oldLines":6,"newStart":32,"newLines":13,"lines":["     );","   }"," ","+  if (!listing.is_full) {","+    return NextResponse.json(","+      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },","+      { status: 400 }","+    );","+  }","+","   const { discordLink } = await req.json();"," ","   if ("]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0f2f8ceb-12d1-4ef2-ada5-bdfef2314ecc","uuid":"f980c9f6-c9f1-4196-a3b6-c42599fcfed1","timestamp":"2026-03-23T21:04:10.344Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","oldString":"  if (!applicationId || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {","newString":"  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n\n        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n        rejectedApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n        }\n\n        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":33,"oldLines":7,"newStart":33,"newLines":7,"lines":["   const body = await req.json();","   const { applicationId, action } = body;"," ","-  if (!applicationId || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {","+  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {","     return NextResponse.json(","       { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },","       { status: 400 }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01G6M8fvmEHZeESFDneYG6hs","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_012f78jj3LxwGvhXyZRMydod","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx","old_string":" setNotAvailable(true);\n      } else {\n        setFetchError(true);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      setFetchError(true);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() =>
